creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Are you still having this problem? 

Have you tried updating your machine to the latest 4-STABLE 
and/or tried the staroffice 5.2 port. 

From what information you've given, this looks to be more 
of an NFS/Linuxulator issue, with staroffice just being 
something that shows up the problem.
